## AC Companion {version}

### What's new
- (fill in before publishing)

### Install
Download **AC-Companion-Setup-{version}.exe** below and run it.
No other software required.

### Connect
This build is pre-configured for the ShinTech crew backend.
Make sure you're on Tailscale before launching.

### Requirements
- Windows 10/11 x64
- Assetto Corsa (optional — needed for server hosting and lap stats)
